latest.title: Control Sugar Cravings & Metabolism with Science-Based Tools | Huberman Lab Essentials
latest.desc: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, I explain how the body senses and uses sugar, and why understanding those mechanisms can help reduce sugar cravings. I discuss different types of sugar and how they are processed by pathways in the gut and the brain to shape appetite and the desire for specif
